hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && /root/.local/bin/code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "/opt/refugio-ali-primera" || true
cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && /root/.local/bin/code-review-graph status --repo "/opt/refugio-ali-primera" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
